title: SXhyf Hard Bristle Crevice Cleaning Brush - Multifunctional Gap Cleaning Brush, Bathroom Cleaning Tools, Grout Brush, Crevice Cleaning Supplies for Household Use, Kitchen, Window, Vehicle (3, Black)
features: QUALITY MATTERS: SXhyf hard bristle crevice cleaning brush is made from high-quality plastic and stainless steel, rustproof, and enduring, with a long service life. The handle is made of non-slip materials, and its shape is ergonomically designed, making it more comfortable to hold and use

DEEP CLEANING: This cleaning brush is designed with a narrow head and a long handle, which can easily enter gaps and corners, making it easier to clean small spaces dust, debris, and other dirt in hard-to-reach areas. The bristles are made of ultra-fine PET bristles that are much harder than ordinary brushes. This crevice cleaning tool is sturdy enough for outdoor use as well
EASY STORAGE: The handle of the grout brush is also designed with a small hole for easy hanging up to save space and drying. After use, simply rinse under the tap and it's clean

MULTIFUNCTIONAL BRUSH: The cleaning brush can be used to clean the gaps of various objects, and the cleaning effect is more comprehensive. Whether it's window gaps, sliding door tracks, sink faucets, sofas, bathtubs, floors, toilet seats, crevice brushes can solve these problems. Meet your different cleaning needs
EASY TO CARRY: SXhyf crevice cleaning brush is 9.8 inches long and 0.7 inches wide. In moderate size, you can easily carry. Suitable for the application of various indoor and outdoor scenes
